requirement_topic.en: EMC — Radiated and Conducted Emissions (SON / NIS Standards)
requirement_topic.zh: EMC——辐射和传导发射（SON / NIS标准）
requirement_topic.zht: EMC——輻射和傳導發射（SON / NIS標準）

summary.en: The Standards Organisation of Nigeria (SON) administers technical standards for EMC via NIS (Nigerian Industrial Standards), many of which adopt IEC/CISPR standards. Imported electronics including wireless devices are subject to SON conformity assessment under the SONCAP programme; a SONCAP Certificate of Conformity is required for customs clearance. SON does not recognise Chinese GB EMC certifications.
summary.zh: 尼日利亚标准化组织（SON）通过NIS（尼日利亚工业标准）管理EMC技术标准，其中许多采用IEC/CISPR标准。包括无线设备在内的进口电子产品须接受SON在SONCAP计划下的符合性评估；海关清关须提交SONCAP符合性证书。SON不承认中国GB EMC认证。
summary.zht: 尼日利亞標準化組織（SON）透過NIS（尼日利亞工業標準）管理EMC技術標準，其中許多採用IEC/CISPR標準。包括無線設備在內的進口電子產品須接受SON在SONCAP計畫下的符合性評估；海關清關須提交SONCAP符合性證書。SON不承認中國GB EMC認證。

summary.en: China EMC for wireless and IT equipment is governed by GB/T 9254 (based on CISPR 32/22) for emissions and GB 17625.1 (based on IEC 61000-3-2) for conducted harmonic disturbances. These are tested domestically and form part of the CCC or self-declaration process.
summary.zh: 中国无线及IT设备的EMC由GB/T 9254（基于CISPR 32/22）管理辐射发射，由GB 17625.1（基于IEC 61000-3-2）管理传导谐波失真。这些标准在国内测试，并构成CCC或自我声明流程的一部分。
summary.zht: 中國無線及IT設備的EMC由GB/T 9254（基於CISPR 32/22）管理輻射發射，由GB 17625.1（基於IEC 61000-3-2）管理傳導諧波失真。這些標準在國內測試，並構成CCC或自我聲明流程的一部分。

gap.en: A SONCAP Certificate of Conformity from a SON-accredited conformity assessment body is required at Nigerian customs for imported electronics. Chinese GB/T 9254 and CCC EMC certificates are not substitutes. The underlying IEC/CISPR test data may be reusable if the conformity assessment body accepts it, but the SONCAP certificate itself must be freshly issued.
gap.zh: 进口电子产品在尼日利亚海关须提交由SON认可的符合性评估机构出具的SONCAP符合性证书。中国GB/T 9254和CCC EMC证书不可替代。如符合性评估机构接受，底层IEC/CISPR测试数据或可复用，但SONCAP证书本身须重新出具。
gap.zht: 進口電子產品在尼日利亞海關須提交由SON認可的符合性評估機構出具的SONCAP符合性證書。中國GB/T 9254和CCC EMC證書不可替代。如符合性評估機構接受，底層IEC/CISPR測試數據或可複用，但SONCAP證書本身須重新出具。

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Chinese GB EMC documentation does not satisfy Nigerian SONCAP requirements. A SONCAP Certificate of Conformity from a SON-accredited body is required for customs clearance of wireless and electronic devices imported into Nigeria.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 中国GB EMC文件不满足尼日利亚SONCAP要求。无线及电子设备进口入尼日利亚时，海关清关须提交由SON认可机构出具的SONCAP符合性证书。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 中國GB EMC文件不滿足尼日利亞SONCAP要求。無線及電子設備進口入尼日利亞時，海關清關須提交由SON認可機構出具的SONCAP符合性證書。

requirement_topic.en: Radio Spectrum / Frequency Compliance (NCC Spectrum Management)
requirement_topic.zh: 无线电频谱/频率合规（NCC频谱管理）
requirement_topic.zht: 無線電頻譜/頻率合規（NCC頻譜管理）

summary.en: NCC manages radio spectrum in Nigeria in alignment with the ITU Africa regional plan. The 2.4 GHz (IEEE 802.11 b/g/n) and 5 GHz (IEEE 802.11 a/n/ac/ax) bands are generally available for Wi-Fi, and Bluetooth operates in the 2.4 GHz ISM band. Frequency compliance is verified as part of the NCC type approval process, not as a separate spectrum licence for consumer devices. Devices must operate within NCC-designated frequency parameters.
summary.zh: NCC依据ITU非洲地区频率计划管理尼日利亚无线电频谱。2.4 GHz（IEEE 802.11 b/g/n）和5 GHz（IEEE 802.11 a/n/ac/ax）频段通常可用于Wi-Fi，蓝牙在2.4 GHz ISM频段运行。消费设备的频率合规作为NCC型式认可流程的一部分进行核验，无需单独申请频谱许可。设备须在NCC指定频率参数范围内运行。
summary.zht: NCC依據ITU非洲地區頻率計畫管理尼日利亞無線電頻譜。2.4 GHz（IEEE 802.11 b/g/n）和5 GHz（IEEE 802.11 a/n/ac/ax）頻段通常可用於Wi-Fi，藍牙在2.4 GHz ISM頻段運行。消費設備的頻率合規作為NCC型式認可流程的一部分進行核驗，無需單獨申請頻譜許可。設備須在NCC指定頻率參數範圍內運行。

standards_or_laws: NCC Frequency Allocation Plan (ITU Africa basis)
NCC Type Approval Regulations — frequency parameters

summary.en: China's SRRC (under MIIT) manages domestic radio frequency allocation. WLAN devices operate under GB 15629.11 (IEEE 802.11 basis). SRRC type approval confirms the device operates within approved Chinese frequency bands. China's 5 GHz WLAN band availability partially differs from international ITU allocations.
summary.zh: 中国SRRC（归属工信部）管理国内无线电频率划分。WLAN设备依据GB 15629.11（基于IEEE 802.11）运行。SRRC型式核准确认设备在经批准的中国频段内运行。中国5 GHz WLAN频段可用范围与ITU国际划分存在部分差异。
summary.zht: 中國SRRC（隸屬工信部）管理國內無線電頻率劃分。WLAN設備依據GB 15629.11（基於IEEE 802.11）運行。SRRC型式核准確認設備在經批准的中國頻段內運行。中國5 GHz WLAN頻段可用範圍與ITU國際劃分存在部分差異。

standards_or_laws: MIIT Frequency Allocation Table of China

gap.en: NCC frequency compliance is assessed within the NCC type approval process; SRRC approval does not substitute. Devices approved for the Chinese frequency plan (particularly 5 GHz sub-bands) should be verified against NCC's band plan before export to Nigeria to avoid out-of-band operation.
gap.zh: NCC频率合规在NCC型式认可流程中进行评估；SRRC批准不可替代。针对中国频率计划（尤其是5 GHz子频段）批准的设备，在出口尼日利亚前应核验其是否符合NCC频率计划，以避免频外运行。
gap.zht: NCC頻率合規在NCC型式認可流程中進行評估；SRRC批准不可替代。針對中國頻率計畫（尤其是5 GHz子頻段）批准的設備，在出口尼日利亞前應核驗其是否符合NCC頻率計畫，以避免頻外運行。

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Radio frequency parameters for Nigeria are governed by NCC and assessed during NCC type approval. Chinese SRRC frequency approval is not recognised by NCC. Verify 5 GHz sub-band compatibility with NCC's frequency allocation plan before export.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 尼日利亚无线电频率参数由NCC管辖，并在NCC型式认可过程中进行评估。NCC不承认中国SRRC频率批准。出口前请核验5 GHz子频段与NCC频率划分计划的兼容性。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 尼日利亞無線電頻率參數由NCC管轄，並在NCC型式認可過程中進行評估。NCC不承認中國SRRC頻率批准。出口前請核驗5 GHz子頻段與NCC頻率劃分計畫的相容性。
